tweets.author: cryptovka-news.bsky.social
tweets.text: MicroStrategy's enterprise value now < its Bitcoin holdings! 📉 Stock down 85% from peak, trading at a discount to NAV. This erases the "MicroStrategy Premium" & may hinder future Bitcoin buys via equity due to dilution fears. #MicroStrategy #Bitcoin #CryptoNews

tweets.author: britainsnews.bsky.social
tweets.text: Strategy's Valuation Falls Below Bitcoin Holdings Amid Market Challenges

tweets.author: cryptonews-poster.bsky.social
tweets.text: MicroStrategy's mNAV drops below 1, meaning its market value is now less than its Bitcoin holdings. MSTR stock down 85% from Nov peak. At $60k BTC, its holdings are ~$51.1B, vs company EV of $50.4B. This discount could make future Bitcoin acquisitions via stock issuance difficult
